title: The Path to Jinbe Opens
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, Narrator, Jinbe, Luffy, Zoro. The core story beat is the path to jinbe opens.
scene: The scene centers on the path to jinbe opens, with King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, Narrator, Jinbe, Luffy, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshii III!!!!?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But why are you here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, frankly! I'm gonna lower HACHI DOWN! Could you grab him for me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, if it isn't octoman! What the heck happened to you...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYU UU..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hachi!!!!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did you get those wounds?! and how in the world are you here?! Were you not captured along with Arlong?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Ahhh, mermaid Princess!! Why, in your glorious presence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It is as though I am a hopeless artist...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ... NO PAINTS THAT I POSSESS CAN HOPE TO EXPRESS YOUR RADIANCE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No canvas in the world can contain your beauty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's cured!!! He's started acting just like he always used to around women!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji's back to his old crazy self!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Why is Princess Shirahoshii here?!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Who are you?! What are you doing on board the sunny?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's den- chan!! He's the brother of my old teacher, Tom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: prin-cess...!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: He's re-coating the sunny for us!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I see! A teacher who's coating frankly's brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uhh... something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Our majesty, Princess Shira- Hoshi...! I know why you must have come here, but it is too dangerous for you to leave shell tower!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Another one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's about the tenth one since we left him back there. He sure doesn't give up easy...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You see?! Why in the world did you bring the Princess here, Luffy-kun?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She'll be fine! She's got me - right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: outra- geous...!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: So this is the grave she was talking about, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's been sitting there for ages...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: that is the resting place of her mother, the queen Otohime...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The Princess was unfortunate enough to fall foul of vander decken with the worst possible timing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Unable even to attend her mother's funeral, she has been sealed away in shell tower for these ten long years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She must have so many things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...she wishes to say to her mother now...

summary: The Path to Jinbe Opens. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
